description: This API routine is obsolete. It has been replaced by the API routine SCENARIONEW, and is implemented by a call to SCENARIONEW. Use this API to create a new Scenario. At least one group must be added to the Scenario through SCENARIOGROUPADD before files may be added to it. If adding files through file tracking is also desired, a group must become the active group which can be done by calling SCENARIOGROUPOPEN. This API routine was first introduced in release 32.0.0. newscenariofile(sfile)
